summary: Conservative non-mutating live PR inventory result. The hydrated artifact shows no security-sensitive seed refs and close, merge, fix, low-signal close, and post-merge close paths are disabled by the run permissions. All open inventory PRs and directly relevant open linked refs should stay open for maintainer/author follow-up rather than be closed or merged by this shard.
